subcodes.first_line: For the lover, in the presence of the Beloved, any assertion of existence or manifestation of self is not permitted, should one step beyond this path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عاشق را نزد معشوق اظهار هستی و خودبینی جائز نه اگر خطوه از این سبیل تجاوز
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for forgiveness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
